case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. VS. V. A. SMISER et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-24-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SMISER, V. A. AKA VICTORIA A. SMISER $25,247.90 PRINCIPAL, $2,082.09 INTEREST, $335.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,665.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
